description: KPK USDC Prime is a Morpho Vault V2 ERC4626 vault that allocates USDC deposits across selected Morpho Blue lending markets via the Markets V1 Adapter. A 5-of-8 Safe holds ownership (setCurator, setIsSentinel), while KPK's 2-of-5 multisig acts as curator — submitting timelocked adapter, cap, and fee changes. Day-to-day rebalancing is performed by any of four allocators: the KPK 2/5 multisig and three individual KPK operator EOAs.

eth:0x354C92aF243d53A24feb3dFF20372Af7b7.name: KPK 5/8 Owner Safe
eth:0x354C92aF243d53A24feb3dFF20372Af7b7.description: Vault owner. Can replace the curator and grant/revoke sentinel roles. Controls {{ownerCapital}} in reachable capital.

eth:0xf8182E5827c06a47A985eC565A3bcd5643.name: KPK 2/5 Multisig (Curator & Allocator)
eth:0xf8182E5827c06a47A985eC565A3bcd5643.description: Curator and allocator. Submits timelocked operations for adapter additions, cap increases, and fee changes, and executes day-to-day asset allocation to adapters within configured caps. Controls {{curatorCapital}} in reachable capital.

eth:0xF0Cf1e3Ec6264b03241826f5b2aBda17B4.name: KPK Operator EOA
eth:0xF0Cf1e3Ec6264b03241826f5b2aBda17B4.description: KPK operator EOA with the allocator role. Can call allocate and deallocate on the vault within configured caps.

eth:0x331D9C769185AE25233314859d53c2b920.name: KPK Operator EOA (Vault Deployer)
eth:0x331D9C769185AE25233314859d53c2b920.description: KPK operator EOA that deployed the vault, also holds the allocator role. Can call allocate and deallocate within configured caps.

eth:0xAF150c6d108D0C2c96BbFC3CeF9B4848b5.name: KPK Operator EOA
eth:0xAF150c6d108D0C2c96BbFC3CeF9B4848b5.description: KPK operator EOA with the allocator role. Can call allocate and deallocate on the vault within configured caps.

eth:0x1d511811ACA9d8817a3e50F29CadFf6243.name: Markets V1 Adapter
eth:0x1d511811ACA9d8817a3e50F29CadFf6243.description: Routes vault deposits directly into individual Morpho Blue V1 markets without passing through an intermediate V1 vault. All vault capital flows through this adapter into Morpho Blue.

eth:0xBBBBBbbBBb9cC5e90e3b3Af64bdAF62C37.name: Morpho Blue
eth:0xBBBBBbbBBb9cC5e90e3b3Af64bdAF62C37.description: The immutable Morpho Blue lending protocol where all vault deposits ultimately land as supply positions.

eth:0x4Ef53d2cAa51C447fdFEEedee8F07FD196.name: KPK USDC Prime Vault (USDC)
eth:0x4Ef53d2cAa51C447fdFEEedee8F07FD196.description: The Morpho Vault V2 contract. Holds USDC supply positions in Morpho Blue markets across WETH, WBTC, wstETH, cbBTC, rETH, and OETH collateral.
